g.text: Calculate center from viewport: panX/panY + container size / 2
Create node = {id: uid(), type:'Generic', label:'New Node', x, y, w:200, h:72}
Display modal with: Label, Description, Type selector, Priority, Status
Fill in Label='Power Supply', Type='Component', Priority='High'
For each group: draw group-box rect with label
For each connection: draw bezier path with arrow marker
For each node: draw foreignObject with colored header + content
Hover over node connector circle (right side)
Draw temporary drag-connection path in drag-connection-layer
Show connection type selector: decomposes into, causes, verified by, mitigates
Draw new bezier path from source to target with appropriate arrow marker and color
